requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电接口标准（Type 2）——挪威
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電接口標準（Type 2）——挪威

summary.en: Norway is an EEA member and implements AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) via the EEA Agreement. Public AC recharging points in Norway are subject to AFIR requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Type 2 for normal-power AC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-2 describes the Type 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR (incorporated via EEA), while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route.
summary.zh: 挪威为EEA成员，通过EEA协议实施AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）。挪威公共交流充电点受AFIR关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定普通功率交流充电点采用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR（通过EEA并入），IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。
summary.zht: 挪威為EEA成員，通過EEA協議實施AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）。挪威公共交流充電點受AFIR關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定普通功率交流充電點採用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR（通過EEA並入），IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR), Art. 4 — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector incompatible with IEC Type 2. GB/T plugs cannot mate with EU/EEA Type 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与IEC Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。GB/T插头无法与欧盟/EEA Type 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與IEC Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。GB/T插頭無法與歐盟/EEA Type 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. A Chinese EV or EVSE designed only around a GB/T AC interface cannot interoperate with Norway public Type 2 AC infrastructure without a physical inlet/socket and control-interface redesign. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR (as incorporated via EEA into Norwegian law) and local safety rules rather than treated as a substitute for compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅围绕GB/T交流接口设计的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计物理插座/接口及控制接口的情况下，无法与挪威公共Type 2交流基础设施互操作。接口外形、针脚数量及锁定机构均不相同。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR（通过EEA并入挪威法律）及当地安全规则核查，不能视为合规接口设计的替代。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅圍繞GB/T交流接口設計的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計物理插座/接口及控制接口的情況下，無法與挪威公共Type 2交流基礎設施互操作。接口外形、針腳數量及鎖定機構均不相同。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR（通過EEA並入挪威法律）及當地安全規則核查，不能視為合規接口設計的替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible AC recharging points, including Type 2 availability as specified in Annex II — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement. IEC/EN 62196-2 is the voluntary technical connector standard/specification used to implement that legal requirement; it is not the legal obligation by itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for Norway public charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T AC. Norway public AC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements (applicable via EEA Agreement), and IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T AC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Type 2 compatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T交流接口，则就挪威公共充电互操作性而言现状不合规。挪威公共交流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求（通过EEA协议适用），IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T交流接口，則就挪威公共充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。挪威公共交流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求（通過EEA協議適用），IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2相容性。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast-Charging Connector Standard (CCS Combo 2) — Norway
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准（CCS Combo 2）——挪威
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準（CCS Combo 2）——挪威

summary.en: Norway implements AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) via the EEA Agreement. Public DC recharging points in Norway are subject to AFIR requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Combo 2 for high-power DC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-3 describes the CCS Combo 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR (incorporated via EEA), while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route.
summary.zh: 挪威通过EEA协议实施AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）。挪威公共直流充电点受AFIR关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定高功率直流充电点采用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR（通过EEA并入），IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。
summary.zht: 挪威通過EEA協議實施AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）。挪威公共直流充電點受AFIR關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定高功率直流充電點採用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR（通過EEA並入），IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR), Art. 4 & Annex II — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector (CHAdeMO-influenced design) incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, communication protocol (CAN vs. PLC), and inlet shape all differ.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口（受CHAdeMO影响）。针脚布局、通信协议（CAN与PLC）及接口外形均不相同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口（受CHAdeMO影響）。針腳佈局、通訊協定（CAN與PLC）及接口外形均不相同。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. Chinese EVs or EVSE with only a GB/T DC interface cannot fast-charge at Norway CCS2 public stations without hardware and communication-stack redesign. The vehicle/charger communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC pathways in common Norway/EEA CCS practice) also differs, compounding the incompatibility beyond the physical plug. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR (applicable in Norway via EEA) and local safety rules.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅配备GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计硬件及通信协议栈的情况下，无法在挪威CCS2公共快充站充电。车辆/充电设备通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与挪威/EEA CCS实践中常见的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路径）也不同，进一步加剧了插头之外的不兼容性。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR（通过EEA适用于挪威）及当地安全规则核查。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅配備GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計硬件及通訊協議棧的情況下，無法在挪威CCS2公共快充站充電。車輛/充電設備通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與挪威/EEA CCS實務中常見的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路徑）也不同，進一步加劇了插頭之外的不相容性。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR（通過EEA適用於挪威）及當地安全規則核查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible high-power DC recharging points, including Combo 2 availability as specified in Annex II — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement. IEC/EN 62196-3 is the voluntary technical connector standard/specification used to implement that legal requirement; it is not the legal obligation by itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for Norway public DC charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T DC. Norway public DC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements (applicable via EEA Agreement), and IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T DC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Combo 2 compatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T直流接口，则就挪威公共直流充电互操作性而言现状不合规。挪威公共直流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求（通过EEA协议适用），IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T直流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Combo 2兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T直流接口，則就挪威公共直流充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。挪威公共直流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求（通過EEA協議適用），IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T直流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Combo 2相容性。

requirement_topic.en: Legal Mandate: AFIR in Norway via EEA Agreement — Connector Enforcement
requirement_topic.zh: 法律依据：通过EEA协议在挪威适用的AFIR——接口执法
requirement_topic.zht: 法律依據：通過EEA協議在挪威適用的AFIR——接口執法

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) replaced Directive 2014/94/EU (AFID) with binding targets. AFIR entered into force 13 April 2024 across the EU. Norway, as an EEA member (not EU member), implements AFIR via the EEA Agreement; the EEA Joint Committee Decision incorporating AFIR is the formal legal mechanism. New public charging pools must comply from the applicable date; all existing pools must be upgraded to Type 2 / CCS2 by 2025–2026 depending on power level. As the country with the world's highest per-capita EV adoption rate, enforcement of AFIR public charging requirements in Norway is actively monitored by Statens vegvesen (Norwegian Public Roads Administration) and charge point operators (CPOs), making connector compliance effectively non-negotiable for any publicly accessible Norway installation.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）以具有约束力的目标取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR于2024年4月13日在欧盟范围内生效。挪威作为EEA成员（而非欧盟成员国），通过EEA协议实施AFIR；将AFIR并入的EEA联合委员会决定是正式法律机制。新建公共充电站须自适用日期起符合要求；现有充电站须于2025-2026年（依功率等级而定）完成升级，配备Type 2/CCS2接口。挪威是全球人均电动汽车普及率最高的国家，AFIR公共充电要求由Statens vegvesen（挪威公共道路管理局）和充电点运营商（CPO）积极监督执行，使得接口合规对于任何挪威公众可访问安装项目实际上不可商议。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）以具有約束力的目標取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR於2024年4月13日在歐盟範圍內生效。挪威作為EEA成員（而非歐盟成員國），通過EEA協議實施AFIR；將AFIR並入的EEA聯合委員會決定是正式法律機制。新建公共充電站須自適用日期起符合要求；現有充電站須於2025-2026年（依功率等級而定）完成升級，配備Type 2/CCS2接口。挪威是全球人均電動汽車普及率最高的國家，AFIR公共充電要求由Statens vegvesen（挪威公共道路管理局）和充電點運營商（CPO）積極監督執行，使得接口合規對於任何挪威公眾可訪問安裝項目實際上不可商議。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) — OJ L 2023/1804, 22 Sep 2023 (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
EEA Agreement — formal mechanism for AFIR incorporation in Norway

summary.en: China's equivalent policy mandate is GB/T 20234 series (enforced via MIIT type-approval). No bilateral connector recognition or mutual acceptance agreement exists between China GB/T and EEA/Norway IEC 62196 standards. (Confirmed: no bilateral connector or certification mutual recognition treaty between CN GB/T 20234 and EEA/Norway IEC 62196 has been concluded as of June 2026.)
summary.zh: 中国对应的政策强制要求为GB/T 20234系列（通过工信部型式认证执行）。中国GB/T标准与EEA/挪威IEC 62196标准之间不存在双边接口互认或相互接受协议。（已确认：截至2026年6月，中国GB/T 20234与EEA/挪威IEC 62196之间未签订双边接口或认证互认条约。）
summary.zht: 中國對應的政策強制要求為GB/T 20234系列（通過工信部型式認證執行）。中國GB/T標準與EEA/挪威IEC 62196標準之間不存在雙邊接口互認或相互接受協議。（已確認：截至2026年6月，中國GB/T 20234與EEA/挪威IEC 62196之間未簽訂雙邊接口或認證互認條約。）

gap.en: No harmonisation or mutual recognition between GB/T and IEC 62196 series. AFIR is a binding Regulation (incorporated into Norway via EEA), meaning no flexibility to accept GB/T connectors. Any EV destined for the Norway market must carry Type 2 (AC) and CCS Combo 2 (DC) inlets as a hard market-entry requirement. Norway's position as the world's highest per-capita EV market means CPOs and Statens vegvesen enforce AFIR connector compliance rigorously.
gap.zh: GB/T与IEC 62196系列之间不存在协调或互认机制。AFIR是具有约束力的法规（通过EEA并入挪威），不存在接受GB/T接口的灵活性。任何面向挪威市场的电动汽车，必须配备Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充电接口，这是进入市场的硬性要求。挪威作为全球人均电动汽车普及率最高的市场，充电点运营商和Statens vegvesen对AFIR接口合规要求执法严格。
gap.zht: GB/T與IEC 62196系列之間不存在協調或互認機制。AFIR是具有約束力的法規（通過EEA並入挪威），不存在接受GB/T接口的靈活性。任何面向挪威市場的電動汽車，必須配備Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充電接口，這是進入市場的硬性要求。挪威作為全球人均電動汽車普及率最高的市場，充電點運營商和Statens vegvesen對AFIR接口合規要求執法嚴格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR is applicable in Norway via the EEA Agreement from the applicable EEA incorporation date for in-scope publicly accessible recharging infrastructure. IEC/EN 62196 connector standards are technical specifications referenced/used to implement AFIR connector requirements, not standalone legal obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically; no reciprocal obligation on Norway/EEA side to accept GB/T

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant as-is for Norway public charging infrastructure where a product relies on Chinese GB/T connectors only. AFIR (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) creates the binding obligation for in-scope public infrastructure; Type 2 / Combo 2 technical compatibility is the practical redesign item. This is a product and infrastructure interoperability gap, not merely a documentation gap. Norway's world-leading EV market means this requirement is enforced without exception.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅依赖中国GB/T接口，则就挪威公共充电基础设施而言现状不合规。AFIR（通过EEA协议适用于挪威）为适用范围内公共基础设施建立具有约束力的义务；Type 2 / Combo 2技术兼容性是实际产品重新设计事项。这是产品及基础设施互操作差距，而非单纯文件缺失。挪威作为全球领先的电动汽车市场，该要求不容例外。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅依賴中國GB/T接口，則就挪威公共充電基礎設施而言現狀不合規。AFIR（通過EEA協議適用於挪威）為適用範圍內公共基礎設施建立具有約束力的義務；Type 2 / Combo 2技術相容性是實際產品重新設計事項。這是產品及基礎設施互操作差距，而非單純文件缺失。挪威作為全球領先的電動汽車市場，該要求不容例外。
